emergency_routing_rules.fallback: If dispatch transfer fails, collect details and trigger urgent callback.

non_emergency_routing_rules.office_hours: Transfer to office queue after collecting caller name and number.
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Collect details and schedule callback during business hours.

call_transfer_rules.failure_script: I'm sorry I could not connect you right now. I will alert dispatch immediately and ensure a quick callback.

after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, confirm emergency, collect name/number/address for emergencies, attempt transfer, then fallback to urgent callback handling if transfer fails.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours, greet caller, capture purpose and contact details, transfer or route call, then confirm next steps and close.
